purpose: Starter shape for filling a character sheet consistently. Keys match existing data-k fields and should not be renamed.

fields.p1.name: Character Name
fields.p1.senses:
Normal vision.
Passive Perception 12 / Insight 12 / Investigation 10
fields.p3.bonds: People, places, duties, or vows that matter.
fields.p3.appearance: Age, height, weight, eyes, skin, hair, visible style.

rowGuidance.weapons: Name <= 20 chars; Atk/DC short; Damage + Type concise; put range/ammo/properties in notes.
rowGuidance.spells: Name <= 20 chars; Range <= 5 chars when possible; Save/Hit short; Damage / Effect gets the rules text.
rowGuidance.features: One feature per chunk. Start with feature name, then trigger/action, then effect.
